name: Artemis Bow
description: Summon a mighty bow and unleash a volley of devastating arrows.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Heavy Caliber having no effect on Ivara’s Artemis Bow.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to deactivate Ivara’s Artemis Bow or swap weapon after throwing a speargun weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed animation issues with Ivara/Ivara Prime’s Artemis Bow.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Ivara’s Artemis Bow now has 20% Status Chance per projectile. Also slightly tweaked how Status Chance and Multishot are displayed in Arsenal stats.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Artemis Bow sometimes firing the previously selected Quiver type instead of the one currently selected.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.changes: This is to address that Split Flight cannot be equipped on the Lenz, Kuva Bramma, or Ivara’s Artemis Bow.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Artemis Bow arrows not reflecting chosen colors when stuck into objects/enemies.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara Prime’s Quiver ability not using her Artemis Bow Prime mesh. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1160446-ivara-primes-1-doesnt-use-the-right-artemis-bow-texture/

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara Prime’s Artemis Bow Prime darkening when viewed in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: The Profit-Taker - Update 24.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Ivara Artemis Bow impact FX.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to customize Ivara's Artemis Bow's Arrows.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.1.0: TennoGen Round 13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Ivara's Artemis Bow was not properly consuming energy.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.3 - Limbo Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Upgrade screen for some Exalted weapons (Exalted Blade, Artemis Bow, etc) showing the name of the weapon in mixed case instead of all CAPS.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.11.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Specters not being able to use Ability weapons with 0 max clip size (eg. Ivara's Artemis Bow).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Ivara’s Artemis Bow ability.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Artemis Bow always shooting with a horizontal spread.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.2.0 + 21.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed (for real) Primary Mods with Fire Rate buffs applying 3x to Ivara's Artemis Bow instead of 2x.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Ivara’s Artemis Bow.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed retaining the Fissure Primary Weapon buff permanently with Ivara’s Artemis Bow.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Ivara's Artemis Bow energy per shot cost decreased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.2 (Phase One: DB Upgrades)
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ivara’s arrows misbehaving after casting her Artemis Bow.
Potential fix for Clients with Hysteria/Exalted Blade/Primal Fury/Artemis Bow active and running into a Nullifier briefly causing complete ability/melee/weapon switch lockout on next cast.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara being left without a weapon after casting Artemis Bow during a ‘Bow Only’ Sortie.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Ivara’s Artemis Bow (while ziplining) and Navigator (while ziplining), Quiver, and Prowl

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Artemis Bow 
Decreased energy cost of shooting Ivara’s Artemis Bow in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara permanently receiving a ‘Power in Use’ error after having her Artemis Bow stolen by a Drahk Master as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/626121-ivara-loses-all-combat-ability-if-you-cast-artemis-bow-while-disarmed-by-a-drahk-master/

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ivara’s Navigator Ability causing arrows shot by her Artemis Bow to fly off course.
Fixed an issue where picking up an item while using Ivara’s Artemis Bow would cause the player to be unable to drop the object, or have it disappear forever.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Artemis Bow not properly getting buffs from Rifle Mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ivara’s Agile idle animation using her Artemis Bow as a prop, causing other Warframes using the animation to look a bit unusual.
Fixed Ivara’s Artemis Bow HUD appearing while Ivara is carrying the Operator in the Second Dream Quest.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted Ivara’s Artemis Bow’s fire and draw audio FX.
